headline: 1 Cash-Heavy Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Companies with more cash than debt can be financially resilient, but that doesn’t mean they’re all strong investments. Some lack leverage because they struggle to grow or generate consistent profits, making them unattractive borrowers.

headline: Jefferies Downgrades Incyte to Hold, Lowers Price Target to $94
summary: Jefferies  analyst Faisal Khurshid   downgrades Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) from Buy to Hold and lowers the price target from $120 to $94.
